text.title: Project Closure with Lessons Extraction Failure Modes

antipattern.symptom: Report congratulates team; no variance; no behaviour changes captured.
antipattern.root-cause: Closure used as ceremony, not learning.
antipattern.fix: Validator requires variance_reason + behaviour_change per lesson.
Each lesson phrased as verb+object+measurable signal.

antipattern.symptom: Lessons committed; nobody assigned; same mistakes recur.
antipattern.fix: Validator requires named owner per lesson.

antipattern.symptom: Closure report archived; lessons never re-read.
antipattern.fix: Next-project kick-off gate requires lesson-adoption table.
